description: The Sales Director at Lumina Office Solutions wants to clear out excess stock of 'Lumina Privacy Screen'. Configure a promotion program named 'Privacy Screen Bulk Saver' using the promotion code 'SCREEN15'. The program must offer a 15% discount on 'Lumina Privacy Screen' conditional on a minimum purchase of 5 units of that product. Verify the setup by creating and saving a quotation for customer 'Apex Interiors' that includes 6 units of 'Lumina Privacy Screen' with the 'SCREEN15' promo code applied.
